# Sialkot Used Machinery Co.

> Direct sale of inspected used industrial machines from Shahpura Road Industrial Area, Sialkot, Punjab, Pakistan. Delivery across Punjab to Lahore, Gujranwala, Gujrat, Jhelum, Sheikhupura, Wazirabad, Daska, Sambrial, Pasrur, Narowal, Hafizabad, Mandi Bahauddin, Kharian and all major cities within ~120 km. WhatsApp +92 300 7166993. Owner-direct, no broker.

Sialkot Used Machinery Co. is a single-owner business reselling production-grade industrial machinery from a working facility in Sialkot — Pakistan's hub for surgical instruments, cutlery, sports goods, and precision tooling. Every machine on this site is in working condition, inspected, and offered with a live video walk-through on WhatsApp before any commitment. Pricing is on request via WhatsApp. We deliver directly across Punjab — to Lahore, Gujranwala, Gujrat, Jhelum, Sheikhupura, Wazirabad, Daska, Sambrial, Pasrur, Narowal, Hafizabad, Mandi Bahauddin, Kharian and all major cities within roughly 120 km of Sialkot. Local pickup also welcome at our Shahpura Road facility.

## Contact

- WhatsApp / Phone: +92 300 7166993
- Address: Shahpura Road Industrial Area, Sialkot, Punjab 51310, Pakistan
- Hours: Monday to Saturday, 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM (Pakistan Standard Time, UTC+5)
- Website: https://machines-for-sale.pk/

## Machines for sale (8 units, in stock)

- [Wire Cut EDM CNC](https://machines-for-sale.pk/wire-cut-edm-cnc.html): Precision wire-cut electrical discharge machine with full CNC control. Cuts hardened steel, tungsten carbide, titanium and exotic alloys to ±0.005 mm accuracy. Featured machine.
- [Rotary Product Surface Grinder](https://machines-for-sale.pk/rotary-surface-grinder.html): Production-grade rotary surface grinder rated 150 pieces per hour. Magnetic chuck, Ra 0.4 µm achievable surface finish. Ideal for surgical instruments and cutting tools.
- [Big Capacity Vibrator](https://machines-for-sale.pk/vibrator.html): Heavy-duty industrial vibratory finisher / deburring machine, big-bowl class. Wet or dry finishing. Standard in surgical-instrument and cutlery industries.
- [5 Heads Drill Machine — Mitsubishi](https://machines-for-sale.pk/drill-mitsubishi.html): Mitsubishi-built 5-spindle multi-head drilling machine for simultaneous multi-hole drilling. Ideal for series production.
- [1000 Amp Rectifier](https://machines-for-sale.pk/rectifier-1000a.html): Industrial DC rectifier up to 1000 A, 6–18 V. Suitable for electroplating (chrome, nickel, copper, zinc, brass), anodizing, electroforming, electrowinning.
- [Adjustable Angle Grinder](https://machines-for-sale.pk/angle-grinder.html): Industrial adjustable-angle tool grinder for sharpening drill bits, milling cutters, lathe bits, planer tools, taps, and reamers. Multi-axis tilt.
- [Horizontal Milling Machine](https://machines-for-sale.pk/horizontal-milling.html): Heavy-duty horizontal mill, spindle parallel to table. Slot, gang, straddle, gear-form milling.
- [Vertical Milling Machine](https://machines-for-sale.pk/vertical-milling.html): Versatile vertical mill, tilting head. Tool & die, mold, surgical instrument and prototype work.

## Industries served

Surgical instrument manufacturing, cutlery and edge tools, tool & die shops, mold making, aerospace job shops, medical device production, automotive components, jewelry tooling, prototype machine shops.

## Frequently asked

- Are these machines used or new? All are used (second-hand) industrial machines, inspected and in working condition.
- Can I see them before buying? Yes — on-site visits by appointment in Sialkot, or live WhatsApp video walk-through.
- Do you deliver to Lahore / Gujranwala / other Punjab cities? Yes — delivery across Punjab to all major cities within ~120 km of Sialkot. Local pickup also welcome.
- Payment? Bank transfer, cash on collection, or local mobile wallets (Easypaisa, JazzCash, Raast). Typical practice: small deposit on confirmation, balance on delivery or collection.
- Why Sialkot? World leader in surgical instruments and a major center for cutlery, sports goods, and precision tooling — strong local industrial ecosystem with parts and service support.

## Structured data

The site exposes JSON-LD schema.org markup for: LocalBusiness, Organization, WebSite, ItemList, Product (with Offers and UsedCondition), BreadcrumbList, FAQPage. A machine-readable index of all listings is available at https://machines-for-sale.pk/machines.json
